description: Development reference clips for RiderLens analysis testing. Every clip added here should get a manifest entry with an honest note about what the rider does right or wrong.

clips.label: crash
clips.notes: Crash after the takeoff: rider and bike separate, the bike cartwheels down the trail (visible riderless at ~6.2s). Regression case for crash detection, honest geometry labeling, and phase detection (approach/compression collapse onto the same frame).
